The Space

Where Comfort Meets Style

Exterior View

Main entrance and facade

1 / 12

Welcome to The Big 14 — a thoughtfully designed guesthouse that combines urban convenience with boutique comfort. Located in the heart of Randburg, Johannesburg, our space offers a perfect retreat for business travelers, couples, or solo adventurers. The space features a luxurious bedroom with premium bedding, a modern bathroom with all essentials, and a welcoming atmosphere that feels like home. Every detail has been curated to ensure your stay is nothing short of exceptional.

Amenities

Everything You Need for a Perfect Stay

We've thought of every detail so you don't have to. From high-speed WiFi to premium linens, The Big 14 offers all the comforts of home with the luxury of a boutique retreat.
